mapper.select: select distinct type from shops where type is not null and type <> '' order by type
select count(1) from shops where name = #{name} and address = #{address}
select * from shops where owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId} order by id desc

select * from shops where (#{type} is null or #{type} = '' or type = #{type}) and (#{keyword} is null or #{keyword} = '' or lower(name) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) or lower(coalesce(address, '')) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))) order by id desc limit #{size} offset #{offset}

select count(1) from shops where (#{type} is null or #{type} = '' or type = #{type}) and (#{keyword} is null or #{keyword} = '' or lower(name) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) or lower(coalesce(address, '')) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')))
